**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level high-altitude tech park deconstruction and the '3-employee commercial display engineering/software outsourcing shell' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Qining Display Technology,' possesses a business license filled with grandiose terms as if copied and pasted: 'electronic display screen production; integrated circuit processing; embedded system equipment production.' The official system naturally categorized it under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly pierced through this manufacturing disguise: the insured headcount is a pitiful 3 people! The paid-in capital is only 285,000 RMB. Even more devastating is its spatial coordinate: 'Room 403, 4th Floor, Building 9... Qilin High-tech Industrial Development Zone.' This is an extremely typical tech incubator/office building address. The logical deduction instantly turned into a deadpan joke: in a small 4th-floor office, a boss with 2 employees and less than 300,000 RMB in capital claims to have built a 'display screen production line' and 'chip processing plant' requiring cleanrooms and heavy equipment? The probe mercilessly deleted all boastful words of 'production, processing' from the license and extracted what these 3 people can actually do on the 4th floor: 'electronic display screen installation, maintenance; software development; system integration.' The truth is extremely grounded: this is a 100% pure 3-Employee Commercial Display Contractor & Software Shell operating from a high-rise office building. The boss is highly likely an engineering contractor who rented an office in the tech park; upon receiving a job to install a large screen in a mall or conference room, they buy ready-made LED modules, hire a few people to go on-site for 'installation and maintenance,' and incidentally provide the supporting control software (software development). The official 'Electronic Device Manufacturing Entity' tag is the most severe algorithmic demotion and mockery of the modern semiconductor and panel manufacturing industries.
